title: Nvidia’s open-source simulator trains surgical robots in under two minutes
summary: By running 8,192 training environments in parallel on GPUs, Nvidia claims a startling speed-up. Surgical-robotics firms including Medtronic, Johnson & Johnson MedTech, and CMR Surgical are using the framework for surgical digital twins and endovascular training.
caption: output/2026-07-23/nvidia-s-open-source-simulator-trains-surgical-robots-in-under-two-min.txt
